title: bromus erectus var. glaucus
intro: Bromus erectus var. glaucus, also known as Bluebunch Wheatgrass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus erectus var. glaucus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make salves, creams, and other topical applications for skin issues and wounds.
